_comment: Channels polled by telegram-scan.sh via the in-skill telegram_fetch.py (Telethon). No longer depends on the external telegram-sync repo. Requires: a venv with telethon installed (python_bin), Telegram credentials in ~/.config/social-scan/.env (TELEGRAM_API_ID, TELEGRAM_API_HASH), and an authorized Telethon session at session_path. See references/SETUP.md for one-time setup. Edit the channels list to change coverage.
